description: At the end of a shift, a plant operator must formally hand over control of the process to the operator on the next shift.

nodes.task_description: Generate a shift summary report from the control system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent obtains a report detailing all alarms, operator actions, and batch statuses from their shift.

nodes.task_description: Review the report with the incoming operator, highlighting any ongoing issues or upcoming critical steps.

expected_outcome.value: The outgoing operator effectively communicates the state of the plant.

nodes.task_description: Both operators apply an electronic signature to the shift log to confirm the handover was completed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent and their replacement both sign the log, formally transferring responsibility.
